88: Correct. A. When R1’s tracked serial fails, its priority drops (105→95 by default). R2 already has priority 100; standby 100 preempt on R2 (under Gi0/0) lets it take the active role when it becomes higher priority. Apply in interface configuration mode, not exec (#).
89: Correct. B. NETCONF over SSH on IOS XE uses TCP 830 by default; use port=830 in manager.connect(). get_config() expects a datastore such as 'running', not 'show running'. device_params should remain {'name':'iosxe'} for ncclient.
90: Correct. B and E. B: output shows Virtual IP address is 10.1.1.1. E: preemption is enabled with delay min 5 secs (HSRPv2). A is false (priority 100 < 255). C is false (hold time is 10 s). D is false (hello 3 s / hold 10 s are defaults).
91: Correct. B. Subnets 10.0.32.0/24–10.0.39.0/24 equal 10.0.32.0/21; wildcard 0.0.7.255. log on the permit matches the requirement. Implicit deny blocks the rest. Extended ACLs use wildcards, not subnet masks (D).
